faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I gift LionGems to my friends?
faq.a1: Use the /gift command on Discord — you can include a personal note with every gift.
faq.q2: Can I transfer a skin to another account?
faq.a2: Skins are bound to a single account. Only LionGems are transferable between users via /gift.
faq.q3: In how many Discord servers can I use my Gems?
faq.a3: Your gems and skins follow your account, so they work in every server that uses LionBot.
faq.q4: Can I get an invoice for my payment?
faq.a4: Stripe sends a receipt automatically. For a custom invoice contact contact@arihoresh.com.
faq.a5: All major credit and debit cards through Stripe, plus Apple Pay, Google Pay and SEPA where available.
faq.a6: Yes. Payments are processed entirely by Stripe — we never see or store your card details. Stripe is PCI-DSS Level 1 certified and trusted by millions of businesses worldwide.
